name: Classic Margherita
description: Wood-fired pizza with fresh mozzarella, basil leaves, and San Marzano tomato sauce. Crisp thin crust.

name: Pepperoni Supreme
description: Loaded pepperoni pizza with extra cheese and a kick of chilli flakes. Family favourite.

name: Garden Vegetable Pizza
description: Bell peppers, mushrooms, olives, and red onion on a thin crust with tomato base.

name: Quattro Formaggi
description: Four-cheese white pizza with mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, and ricotta. No tomato sauce.

name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
description: Grilled chicken, smoky BBQ sauce, red onion, and coriander on a soft crust.

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Rich Roman pasta with eggs, pancetta, pecorino cheese, and cracked black pepper. No cream.

name: Penne Arrabbiata
description: Spicy tomato penne with garlic, chilli, and parsley. A southern Italian classic.

name: Linguine Vongole
description: Linguine with fresh clams, white wine, garlic, parsley, and a squeeze of lemon.

name: Lasagna al Forno
description: Layered pasta bake with rich beef ragu, bechamel, and parmesan. Comfort food.

name: Pesto Trofie
description: Twisted Ligurian pasta tossed with bright basil pesto, pine nuts, and parmesan.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine with garlicky croutons, anchovy dressing, and shaved parmesan.

name: Greek Village Salad
description: Tomato, cucumber, red onion, kalamata olives, and feta with oregano and olive oil.

name: Quinoa Power Bowl
description: Protein-packed bowl with quinoa, chickpeas, roasted veg, avocado, and tahini drizzle.

name: Burrata & Heirloom Tomato
description: Creamy burrata over heirloom tomatoes with basil oil, sea salt, and grilled bread.

name: Niçoise Salad
description: Tuna, green beans, new potatoes, eggs, olives, and tomato in a French classic.

name: Tiramisu
description: Layers of espresso-soaked savoiardi with mascarpone cream and cocoa dusting. Classic Italian dolce.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm individual chocolate cakes with a molten centre. Served with vanilla ice cream.

name: Lemon Tart
description: Buttery shortcrust pastry filled with bright sharp lemon curd and dusted with icing sugar.

name: Crème Brûlée
description: Silky vanilla custard with a brittle caramelised sugar crust. Cracks with a satisfying tap.

name: Apple Crumble
description: Spiced apple filling under a buttery oat crumble. Best with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

name: Cappuccino
description: Espresso topped with steamed milk and a thick foam crown. Italian breakfast staple.

name: Iced Matcha Latte
description: Whisked premium matcha with cold milk over ice. Earthy, slightly sweet, caffeinated.

name: Aperol Spritz
description: Bright orange Italian aperitif with prosecco, soda, and a fat orange slice.

name: Mango Smoothie
description: Thick blended drink with ripe mango, yogurt, and a touch of honey.

name: Old Fashioned
description: Bourbon stirred with sugar, bitters, and orange peel. The original cocktail.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Tandoori-grilled chicken in a creamy tomato curry with garam masala and fenugreek.

name: Thai Green Curry
description: Fragrant green curry paste with coconut milk, Thai basil, chicken, and bamboo shoots.

name: Japanese Beef Curry
description: Mild slow-cooked curry with tender beef, carrots, and potatoes. Served over rice.

name: Vegan Chickpea Curry
description: Hearty plant-based curry with chickpeas, spinach, and warming spices in tomato sauce.

name: Massaman Curry
description: Rich Thai-Muslim curry with peanuts, potato, and tender beef. Mild heat, deep aromatics.
